description_long: This is a hexagonal above-ground jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a blue water-filled interior. The jacuzzi features a metal ladder at the front for easy entry and exit, and a set of wooden steps adjacent to the ladder. On one side, there is an orange filtration or pump unit connected to the jacuzzi, indicating a functional water circulation system. The water inside appears clean and nearly full, with the surface level just below the wooden rim. The structure is supported by a concrete or stone base, providing stability and elevating the jacuzzi above ground level. No visible water jets or control panels are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A hexagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with a blue water interior, metal ladder, wooden steps, and an orange filtration unit on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal ladder, wooden steps, and the clear blue water inside the hexagonal wooden jacuzzi.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the wooden steps, metal ladder, and the orange filtration unit attached to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the orange filtration unit and the back of the jacuzzi, with the water surface visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the wooden steps, metal ladder, and the filtration unit on the opposite side.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water surface just below the rim
